problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Epigenetic. Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
